purpose: Replay an exported bundle against the same input and prove structural fidelity. Exercises the OS-011 5.4 fail-fast path on a happy run (no mismatch).
task_prompt: Walk a deterministic 3-step task in the simulator: read tile A, write to tile B, read tile B back. Output should be the final value at tile B.

pass_criteria.notes: Re-import bundle into a fresh session and replay. Edges committed must equal edges attempted; no SurpriseSignals expected.
